# HeadyVault
> Your Sovereign AI Data Vault — part of the Heady ecosystem

HeadyVault provides enterprise-grade encrypted data storage for AI workloads.
Zero-trust security, edge-first architecture, and phi-scaled auto-scaling.

## Features
- Edge-First: 300+ Cloudflare edge locations, sub-100ms latency
- Zero-Trust: Every request authenticated, every connection encrypted
- Auto-Scaling: Fibonacci-based resource allocation
- API-First: REST and GraphQL with comprehensive SDKs

## Links
- https://headysystems.com
- https://headyapi.com/docs/vault
